description: As a financial crime compliance officer, perform a Beneficial Ownership (UBO) investigation for the client 'OmniVerse Logistics'. Using the starter diagram '~/Diagrams/omniverse_structure.drawio' and the investigation report at '~/Desktop/investigation_report_882.txt', map the full ownership structure including all companies, trusts, and individuals mentioned. Connect nodes with arrows showing ownership direction and label them with the direct ownership percentages. Calculate the 'Total Effective Ownership' for each natural person by multiplying percentages down chains and summing multiple paths, adding a text label to each person's node with their calculated total percentage (e.g., 'Total: 15%'). Identify Ultimate Beneficial Owners (UBOs) using a 25% threshold: color nodes RED if ownership is >25% and GREEN if <=25%. Export the final diagram as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/exports/omniverse_ubo_map.pdf'. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
